programmes.show_description: Ghost Fort Of The Civil War. Phil and Jess gain unprecedented access to investigate ghostly voices and apparitions in Fort Morgan, a massive Civil War stronghold. S3, Ep3
Civil War Ghosts In The Bay. Jess and Phil dive deeper into the tragic history of Fort Morgan. Amy Bruni and Adam Berry join them for the investigation. S3, Ep4

Blast from the Past. The Baggage Battlers head to the Boston Estates Auction to gamble on historical items, but is a document announcing George Washington's death the real thing? S2, Ep3
Man on Fire. The Baggage Battlers head to Greensboro, which is a major hub for imported and exported goods. But will they unearth any valuable items in the lot at Quality Salvage? S2, Ep1
Winds Of Misfortune - Part 1. A series of questionable calls by Kris brings the Mistress to her breaking point. Mr. Gold takes a huge gamble by mining Cooper Gulch. S11, Ep5
Winds Of Misfortune - Part 2. A series of questionable calls by Kris brings the Mistress to her breaking point. Mr. Gold takes a huge gamble by mining Cooper Gulch. S11, Ep6
The Bates. Paul Mackie and his expert team must haul a crew of first-time gold miners out of an epic three-year gold drought before their operation and family legacy ends in ruin. S1, Ep1
Blue Tongues And Hairy Legs. First, Julia deals with a large python hanging in a treetop. Next, the team catch a red-bellied black snake trapped in an air conditioning box. S1, Ep4
A Slap In The Face Or A Kick In The Butt. Mid-season and frozen crabs, frozen gear and a frozen harbour chill the hearts of the crew. Plus, the Northwestern battles a deadly storm. S5, Ep12
Ends Of The Earth. When the fleet gets word of great fishing by the ice pack, the chase is on. But will hellish hours and missing pots push these men over the edge? S5, Ep13
Treasure Of The Trinity. Treasure hunters search for clues to a vast fortune they believe is hidden on Brazil's 'Snake Island.' But team tensions could derail the expedition. S1, Ep1
Temple Of Doom. Josh Gates goes to the Cambodian jungle to explore the lost city of the Khmer Empire. He seeks a mystical relic believed to hold the power to incinerate enemies. S1, Ep1
The Legend of Jesse James. Josh travels across the American Midwest in search of Jesse James' legendary loot. He rappels off a cliff on Wichita Mountain and follows treasure hunters. S1, Ep2
Homestead Of Horrors. There's a nightmare in North Carolina. A couple's ramshackle cabin has exposed wires in the shower livestock decimated by predators. Can the Raneys help? S1, Ep11
Grizzly Bait. Arctic temperatures and a hungry grizzly wreak havoc on a struggling homestead. The Raneys take action with big builds - but tragedy strikes. S1, Ep12
Race Against Time. The Rookies battle busted hoses and finally hit treasure. Meanwhile, at their wash plant, the Cooke Brothers race to beat the worst drought in a decade. S2, Ep9
Desperate Times, Desperate Measures. Justin and Becky risk their lives underground. Plus, opal hunting legend Col Duff is back, hunting long forgotten treasure. S2, Ep10
We Have Not Yet Begun to Fight. As the polar ice descends, The Saga is in danger of sinking, Jake must act fast to save his crew, and Josh gambles big-time by heading towards danger. S11, Ep18
My Face Is Killing Me. A Romanian boy's face grows too fast, slowly choking him to death, and doctors try a possible treatment. Plus, a child was born with an extra arm on his back. S5, Ep3
Limbless Little Girl. An English girl whose limbs had to be amputated when she was born is fitted for prosthetics. A Polish man is the world's first recipient of a donor hand. S5, Ep4
An angry confrontation could see Marcus, Linden and Dale thrown off their lease. Impurities in their gold force the Dust Devils to take a big gamble. S6, Ep16
All-Stars: Hunted Humans. All-Stars: Hunted Humans. 13 all-star survivalists try to survive for 40 days in Africa's Selati Basin. When one group scavenges meat, hungry predators stalk their camp. S3,
All-Stars: Africa Strikes First. One survivalist is attacked by a venomous predator just three days into the challenge. And, the group compete with aggressive wildlife for resources. S3, Ep2

Blacksburg Barn. The team races to salvage an 1800s barn in Blacksburg, VA, before a hurricane rolls in. Later, they turn part of an airplane into a stunning desk. S10, Ep1
Bluefield House. The team go to the Bluefield House in West Virginia to restock classic warehouse commodities. Plus, they head up north to deliver a large lamppost. S10, Ep2
No Jane, No Gain - Part 1. A brand-new arrival shakes up the gold game as Emily shows Jane Kilcher the ropes of running a dredge. Kris Kelly deals with an excavator malfunction. S11, Ep7
No Jane, No Gain - Part 2. A brand-new arrival shakes up the gold game as Emily shows Jane Kilcher the ropes of running a dredge. Kris Kelly deals with an excavator malfunction. S11, Ep8
The Gibsons. Paul Mackie and his team of experts travel to the unforgiving Western Australian Pilbara to help an Indigenous family gold mine save itself from financial disaster. S1, Ep2
A Fatal Mistake. First, Julia catches a small venomous snake hidden under an air conditioning box. Plus, an eastern brown snake is spotted in a customer's garden. S1, Ep5
Bitter Tears. Weeks into the opilio season, delirium sets in - and deadly mistakes are made. But for one fisherman it is a tragedy on land that causes heartbreak at sea. S5, Ep14
Day Of Reckoning. The opilio season is almost over, but a storm front has the skippers on edge. The boats race to plug their tanks with crab, but can they make it back unscathed? S5, Ep15
The Opposite Of Paradise. The team gear up for their first venture onto Snake Island, where they'll face triple-digit heat and one of the world's deadliest vipers. S1, Ep2
World's 8th Wonder. Josh journeys from Russia to Germany in search of history's most expensive stolen object, the Amber Chamber. He retraces the steps of Nazi soldiers. S1, Ep3
Amelia Earhart. Josh Gates hunts down new evidence on the disappearance of Amelia Earhart. He starts in Papua New Guinea, ending his journey in Fiji, hoping to find her remains. S1, Ep4
When Cows Attack. The Raneys arrives at a homestead threatened by heat, coyotes and even cows. Disaster strikes when Marty attempts to protect livestock with a massive build. S1, Ep13
The Bears And The Bees. The Raneys arrives at a homestead with a bee-obsessed owner unintentionally attracting bears with his hives. Plus, dangerous winds threaten the bathhouse. S1, Ep14
Battling Back. The Fire Crew's season rests on a knife-edge as they battle their way back from a disastrous setback. Plus, the Opal Queen mines rock hard walls alone. S2, Ep11
Make Or Break. Justin tackles a deal that could make or break him. And, the Boulder Boys race to save their claim from a monsoon flood while the Cooke Brothers hit pay dirt. S2, Ep12
Carpe Diem. A new face joins the fold - 23-year-old Sean Dwyer fighting for the legacy of his father. Plus, Captain Keith's life spirals, and Sig torments his old protégé. S12, Ep1
Gold On The Line. Frustrations reach a breaking point between Chambo and Andy. For Todd, it comes down to a single gold weigh to keep his crew intact. S2, Ep7
Forged In Fury. Sig risks capsizing when his tank floods in an Arctic storm. Sophia must prove she can lead in severe weather while Jake battles insubordination. S20, Ep7
A broken excavator shuts down the Ferals' operation. Jacqui finds the biggest nugget of her career, while the Poseidon Crew uncover a rubbish tip. S6, Ep17
